name: 180 Degree Longitude Passes Through Us
original_name: เส้นลองจิจูดที่ 180 องศาลากผ่านเรา
overview: On a road trip with his spirited mother, a student meets his late father’s elusive best friend, uncovering clues to a past both men seem desperate to keep hidden.

trailers.title: 180 Degree Longitude Passes Through Us | Official Trailer | His secret gay lover is mom's bestie...
